entries.current_position: RP-C02 through RP-C05 are accepted. RP-C05 fresh-clone Sunrise reconstructed the RP-C06 gate; unresolved RP-C01 missions remain explicit blockers and are not promoted.
blockers: RP-C01-M02 fresh Work/Athena-native Phoenix Blade control is unproven.
RP-C01-M05 Arrow/Spear byte and receipt parity is not proven end to end.
RP-C01-M06 protected-path handoff detection is proven, but protected execution was not run.
RP-C01-M07 the live rejection matrix is partial; the full fail-closed fallback set is unproven.
RP-C01-M08 routine Jayson carrier dependency retirement is unproven.
entries.next_action: Prepare RP-C06 deterministic conservation from exact current main on a new branch without reusing closed PR #127.
entries.next_approval: Apply the existing Preview to Execute rule, exact-head detached review, and canonical readback to the new RP-C06 transaction.
